scripts.vercel-build: tsc && mkdir -p build/connect/images && cp public/connect/index.html build/connect/index.html && cp public/404.html build/404.html && cp public/bluestone_pim_logo.png build/bluestone_pim_logo.png && cp public/og-image.jpg build/og-image.jpg && cp -r public/brand_assets build/brand_assets && cp -r public/connect/images/. build/connect/images/
